name: Connecteam Employee Management API
what_it_does: Connecteam REST API for employee management platform targeting deskless and frontline workers. Enables AI agents to manage employee schedules, track time and location, deliver training content, send company communications, manage tasks and checklists, and integrate workforce data with HR and payroll systems. Connecteam serves retail, hospitality, construction, and field service industries.
use_cases: Managing employee schedules and shift assignments from workforce planning agents
Tracking time and attendance from payroll integration agents
Delivering training modules and tracking completion from L&D agents
Sending company announcements and managing task checklists from operations agents
not_for: Office-based knowledge workers without frontline focus
Complex HCM without deskless worker communication needs
Enterprise payroll processing without light-touch workforce management
best_when: A retail, hospitality, or field service business wants AI agents to manage frontline employee scheduling, time tracking, training delivery, and internal communication in a unified mobile platform.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee location tracking and mobile communications require appropriate disclosure. Scheduling and attendance data is personnel data.

auth.notes: Connecteam uses API key authentication. Keys are account-scoped. Simple key-based model for integration development.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: unlimited users on basic features for small teams
pricing.paid_tiers: Operations, Communications, and HR Hubs with per-user or flat monthly pricing
pricing.notes: Israeli company. Unique pricing: small teams can get free unlimited users. Hub-based pricing allows modular feature purchasing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee location tracking requires disclosure; communications data is sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API with API key
Israeli company — data residency in US and EU; verify for local compliance
Hub-based product: Operations, Communications, HR — some features require specific hubs
Mobile-first platform — API primarily supports backend automation, not UI replacement
No granular scopes — API key provides broad account access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee location and communications data. SOC2, GDPR. Israeli company. API key auth. No granular scopes.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee location and mobile comms data. SOC2, GDPR. Israeli company. API key. No granular scopes.
